DNKK Kano Free Route Airspace

FRA Waypoints

  • Controllers may redirect any flights from/to a FRA Entry/Exit Waypoint to a FRA Arrival/Departure Connecting Waypoint or from a FRA Entry Waypoint to a FRA Exit Waypoint.
  • Controllers may never redirect any flight that may cross Restricted or Special User Airspace. In those circumstances, controllers may use the FRA Intermediate Waypoints to redirect the flights.
Waypoint Type Flight Levels Level Availablty Remarks
KELAK EXAD ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
GATAG EXAD ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
NANOS EXAD ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
KORUT EXAD ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
ARDEX EXAD ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
MIMBA EXAD ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
OBUDU EXAD ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
POLTO EX ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
DETAR EX ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
EDUKO EX ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
TAKUM EX ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
ENBUT EX ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
EBIMU EX ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
LIREX EX ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
TENTU EX ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
GULEN EX ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
ONSEV EX ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
BOVDA EX ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
ETRIS EX ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
GANDA EX ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
GADUV EX ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
IKROP EX ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
OPALA EX ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
BIPIV EX ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
KIPSA EX ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
LAG VOR AD ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
ABC VOR ADI ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
BUDSI AI ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
OGDIX I ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
OXORU I ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
POSIB I ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
GURAP I ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
IBA I ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
APRUN I ODD / EVEN FL245 / UNLTD -
RALIN X ODD FL245 / UNLTD -
Notes
Type E - Entry Waypoint
Type X - Exit Waypoint
Type A - Arrival Connecting Waypoint
Type D - Departure Connecting Waypoint
Type I - Intermediate Point

FRA for DN Airports

Airport Type From/To Start Intermediate End Remarks
DNAA Both DRRR NANOS - ABC VOR Bidirectional
Both DRRR KORUT - ABC VOR Bidirectional
Both DRRR MIMBA OXORU ABC VOR Bidirectional
Both FCCC OBUDU - ABC VOR Bidirectional
Both FTTT KELAG POSIB - GURAP ABC VOR
DNMM Arrival DRRR NANOS BUDSI LAG VOR Arrival Only, Even FL
Departure DRRR LAG - NANOS Departure Only, Odd FL
Both FCCC LAG - ARDEX Bidirectional
Both FCCC LAG - GATAG Bidirectional
Both FTTT KELAG OGDIX LAG VOR Bidirectional

FRA for Overflights

From To Entry Via Exit Remarks
DGAC DRRR POLTO APRUN DETAR -
DGAC DRRR POLTO APRUN KORUT -
DGAC FCCC EDUKO - ARDEX -
DGAC FCCC GANDA - GADUV -
DGAC FCCC KIPSA - BIPIV -
DGAC FCCC LIREX - IKROP -
DGAC FCCC TENTU - LIREX -
DGAC FCCC OPALA - ARDEX -
DGAC FCCC OPALA - RALIN Unidirectional Only
DGAC FCCC POLTO - IKROP -
DGAC FCCC POLTO - RALIN Unidirectional Only
